title: BEM-1158 validator runner
objective:
Create file governance/validators/run_bem931_validator_suite.py with content import json
import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path

INDEX = Path("governance/validators/bem931_validator_suite_index.json")


def run_cmd(path):
    proc = subprocess.run([sys.executable, path], text=True, capture_output=True)
    return {"path": path, "returncode": proc.returncode, "stdout": proc.stdout.strip(), "stderr": proc.stderr.strip(), "ok": proc.returncode == 0}


def run_suite():
    data = json.loads(INDEX.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    results = []
    for validator in data.get("validators", []):
        results.append(run_cmd(validator))
    mock = data.get("mock_e2e")
    if mock:
        results.append(run_cmd(mock))
    return {"ok": all(item["ok"] for item in results), "results": results, "release_pass": False}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    result = run_suite()
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
